title: Greek Pepper Fritters
description: Crispy fritters filled with a flavorful mix of Greek seasonings and sweet peppers, perfect as a side dish or snack.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 375°F (190°C).
In a bowl, mix together the diced pepper, greek yogurt, flour, salt, and black pepper.
Add the minced garlic and lightly beaten egg to the bowl and mix until well combined.
Using a spoon, drop small amounts of the mixture into the hot oil, about 1 tablespoonful at a time.
Fry the fritters for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and place on a paper towel-lined plate to drain excess oil.
Serve the fritters hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
